calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets (Probate Code Section 850)
Off Calendar Nov-01-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Huster for petitioner Jane Fujii; Amanda Ebey for Harry Coker.

In response to an inquiry by the Court, Ms. Ebey stated that she fully supported the petition. She stated that it was a difficult case, and that counsel and the parties had worked hard to achieve a settlement. The Court expressed concern that the proposed settlement would result in payouts from both trusts, when the trust documents were in conflict. Mr. Huster stated that while he believed the Court could uphold the 2013 trust as vaild, there was support for the contention that the trustor lacked testamentary capacity at the time it was executed. He stated that the litigation was very contentious, and that all had accepted the settlement. He added that there could be no distribution wighout the Court's approval as the holder of the disputed funds was unwilling to make any distribution without a court order. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)
